svg.title: A200 ChaCha10 public-geometry complete-partition boundary
svg.desc: Four complete affine covers each contain 32 unknown cells and no returned model. Gray spans the same row space as the prior numeric prefix, while the three formula-derived row spaces are pairwise distinct.
svg.text: Same still-secret ChaCha10 width-20 challenge · b8 / 4,096 target bits · 10,000 ms per cell
Gray = A198 numeric-prefix row span exactly: encoding/compiler control, not new cell membership.
Gray control: canonical RREF weights [1,1,1,1,1] · same span as numeric
Fiedler filtration: canonical RREF weights [1,1,1,1,8] · distinct formula-derived span
Laplacian modes 1–5: canonical RREF weights [8,8,10,10,12] · distinct formula-derived span
Signed-SVD modes 1–5: canonical RREF weights [6,8,8,10,12] · distinct formula-derived span
All 128 cells executed · UNKNOWN is not UNSAT · no absence, recovery, or uniqueness claim
